summary: coordination.pg.sql.ts missing from src/ — 3 coordination tables lack Postgres equivalent despite being critical for cross-session coordination
details: CoordinationClaimTable, CoordinationReservationTable, CoordinationFanOutTable are defined with sqliteTable from drizzle-orm/sqlite-core but have no pgTable equivalent. An archived coordination.pg.sql.ts existed in prior sessions but was deleted. This blocks full PG migration completeness and breaks drizzle-kit generate output for the coordination domain.

summary: drizzle.config.pg.ts exists on disk but is untracked — CI and fresh clones cannot generate PG migrations
details: The Postgres Drizzle Kit config file exists with dialect: 'postgresql' and correct schema glob (./src/**/*.pg.sql.ts → ./migration-pg) but is not committed to git. Only the SQLite config (drizzle.config.ts) is tracked. This breaks build reproducibility.

summary: CI has zero Postgres service containers across 26 workflow files — PG tests never execute in pipeline
details: NONE of the 26 GitHub Actions workflow files reference postgres, pg, service containers for databases, or OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL. The test:pg script and adapter.pg.test.ts exist but never run in CI.
